query:
SELECT c.id, c.nome, c.estabelecimentoId, e.nome as estabelecimentoNome, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tabelasPreco tp WHERE tp.convenioId = c.id) as qtdTabelas
FROM convenios c
LEFT JOIN estabelecimentos e ON c.estabelecimentoId = e.id
ORDER BY c.estabelecimentoId;
